# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - deploy
  - release

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  TAG_PREFIX: "deploy"
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release_notes.md"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

default:
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash git curl jq coreutils util-linux
    - git config --global user.email "${GITLAB_USER_EMAIL:-ci@example.com}"
    - git config --global user.name "${GITLAB_USER_NAME:-gitlab-ci}"

prepare_mr_metadata:
  stage: prepare
  image: alpine:3.20
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
      when: on_success
    - when: never
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      title="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-}"
      desc="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-}"
      if [ -z "$title" ]; then title="(no MR title)"; fi
      if [ -z "$desc" ]; then desc="(no MR description)"; fi

      printf "%s" "$title" > mr_title.txt
      printf "%s" "$desc" > mr_description.txt

      safe_title="$(printf "%s" "$title" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed -E 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-+|-+$//g; s/-+/-/g' | cut -c1-48)"
      if [ -z "$safe_title" ]; then safe_title="mr"; fi
      printf "%s" "$safe_title" > mr_title_slug.txt

      {
        echo "MR_TITLE<<EOF"
        cat mr_title.txt
        echo
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION<<EOF"
        cat mr_description.txt
        echo
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_TITLE_SLUG=$safe_title"
      } > mr.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: mr.env
    paths:
      - mr_title.txt
      - mr_description.txt
      - mr_title_slug.txt
    expire_in: 7 days

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      optional: true
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      title="${MR_TITLE:-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_TITLE:-Build}}}"
      desc="${MR_DESCRIPTION:-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-}}"

      echo "Build notification:"
      echo "  Project: $CI_PROJECT_PATH"
      echo "  Ref: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"
      echo "  MR Title: $title"
      echo "  MR Description: ${desc:-"(none)"}"
      echo "  Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA"

      mkdir -p dist
      printf "build_ref=%s\n" "$CI_COMMIT_SHA" > dist/build.txt
      printf "mr_title=%s\n" "$title" >> dist/build.txt
      printf "mr_description=%s\n" "$(printf "%s" "$desc" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed -E 's/[[:space:]]+/ /g')" >> dist/build.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
    expire_in: 7 days

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: on_success
    - when: never
  needs:
    - job: build
      optional: true
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      optional: true
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      title="${MR_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_TITLE:-Deploy}}"
      desc="${MR_DESCRIPTION:-}"

      safe_title="${MR_TITLE_SLUG:-$(printf "%s" "$title" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed -E 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-+|-+$//g; s/-+/-/g' | cut -c1-48)}"
      if [ -z "$safe_title" ]; then safe_title="deploy"; fi

      ts="$(date -u +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
      tag_name="${TAG_PREFIX}-${safe_title}-${ts}"

      echo "Deploy notification:"
      echo "  Project: $CI_PROJECT_PATH"
      echo "  Env: production"
      echo "  MR Title: $title"
      echo "  MR Description: ${desc:-"(none)"}"
      echo "  Tag to create: $tag_name"
      echo "  Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA"

      git fetch --tags origin
      git tag -a "$tag_name" -m "Deploy: $title" -m "" -m "$desc" "$CI_COMMIT_SHA"

      git remote set-url origin "https://oauth2:${GITLAB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git"
      git push origin "$tag_name"

      printf "%s" "$tag_name" > deploy_tag.txt

      {
        echo "## Deployment"
        echo
        echo "- Tag: $tag_name"
        echo "- Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA"
        echo "- MR Title: $title"
        echo
        echo "### MR Description"
        echo
        echo "${desc:-"(none)"}"
        echo
      } > "${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deploy_tag.txt
      - release_notes.md
    expire_in: 30 days

release_notes_and_commit:
  stage: release
  image: alpine:3.20
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: on_success
    - when: never
  needs:
    - job: deploy
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      tag_name="$(cat deploy_tag.txt)"
      title="${MR_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_TITLE:-Release}}"
      desc="${MR_DESCRIPTION:-}"

      notes_file="${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}"
      if [ ! -f "$notes_file" ]; then
        echo "No release notes file found."
        exit 1
      fi

      msg_subject="Release notes: ${title}"
      msg_body="$(cat "$notes_file")"

      if [ -n "${GITLAB_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
        git fetch origin "$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
        git checkout -B "$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH" "origin/$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"

        notes_dir="release-notes"
        mkdir -p "$notes_dir"
        cp "$notes_file" "$notes_dir/${tag_name}.md"

        git add "$notes_dir/${tag_name}.md"
        git commit -m "$msg_subject" -m "$msg_body" || true
        git remote set-url origin "https://oauth2:${GITLAB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git"
        git push origin "$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
      fi
